groupings.title: TurboDocx E-Signatures & SDK
groupings.description: TurboDocx SDK skills — install the TurboDocx SDK to add TurboDocx e-signatures (TurboSign), TurboDocx template-based document generation (TurboDocx Deliverable), and TurboDocx partner management (TurboPartner) across JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Go, PHP, and Java with TurboDocx.

groupings.title: TurboDocx Html-to-Docx
groupings.description: TurboDocx HTML-to-Word skills — use TurboDocx @turbodocx/html-to-docx to convert HTML into Microsoft Word (.docx) documents in Node.js and the browser. TurboDocx document generation with no Puppeteer, Chrome, or LibreOffice.
